title: cremanthodium citriflorum
intro: Cremanthodium citriflorum, also known as the yellow flowering cremanthodium, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce pain and combat infections. The health benefits of Cremanthodium citriflorum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the flowers or leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
